{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Dawn Oath
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dawn Oath]] runes can be blocked by rainbow light.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
